steps.title: Find the size detail
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the size of the Maple Bend NWR. The notes give that exact detail: the refuge encompasses 90 acres.

steps.title: Select the acreage choice
steps.content: The matching option states that Maple Bend NWR encompasses 90 acres in Arkansas. Choice A focuses on management and activity limits, Choice B on location and habitat, and Choice C on habitat and management; none of them gives the size. The answer is D.
